flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Viterbo University fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6k → 1.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Viterbo University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.9k → $34.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Viterbo University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.9k → $34.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Viterbo University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).
